ddls:
CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion thread */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the discussion thread */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the thread */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the thread was created */,
  "last_message" TEXT /* Text of the last message posted in the thread */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary category the thread belongs to */,
  "tag_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tag IDs */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the thread has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the thread has received */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is private */,
  "last_reply_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last reply to the thread */,
  "last_reply_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the last reply */,
  "pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is pinned to the top */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the thread is locked (no new replies allowed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_last_reply_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_reply_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, member) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed and salted) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the user */,
  "reputation_points" INTEGER /* Reputation points earned by the user */,
  "badges" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of badges earned by the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the forum */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread the reply belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "parent_reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent reply (for nested replies) */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was posted */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the reply has received */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reply has been edited */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_parent_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., General, Technical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_categories" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the thread belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., apogee, iss) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is hidden from public view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_tags" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag assigned to the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id", "tag_id")
)
